action.reasoning: Observation: 12 epochs CLIP-B/16 plateaued at val_f1=0.0996, eval=0.0642. Same as 4-epoch result. 2.6h left, 20 iters. Analysis: Model is hitting a ceiling at this resolution/size. The big gap val(0.10) vs eval(0.064) shows OOD shift. Need better representations - try CLIP-L/14 with proper hyperparameters (the prior L/14 attempt failed due to logit adjustment). Single L/14 epoch ~40min so 3 epochs = 2h. That's risky given 2.6h left. Better: train CLIP-L/14 for 2 epochs with same recipe that worked for B/16 - lr=1e-5, head_lr=1e-4, label smoothing, no logit adjust. Decision: Train CLIP-L/14 with the exact B/16 recipe for 2 epochs (~80 min). Save best.pt only if improving over current 0.0996.
